location: Not found anywhere — it's the default combat state whenever no weapon is equipped in either hand, available to every character from the very start of the game.
region: None — always available regardless of region

source.name: None (innate default state, no source to acquire)

tactics: No location or acquisition is needed — it's simply what happens when both weapon slots are empty.
Every starting class can throw unarmed strikes and kicks immediately, no tutorial gating.
Useful as a zero-weight panic option if out of stamina/weapons, or as the basis for meme/challenge 'fist only' runs.
lore: The game states it plainly: "No armament equipped. Bare fists will be used to attack." There's no legend behind it, just the Tarnished's own knuckles.

builds.name: Challenge/naked run
builds.why: Zero weight, zero stat requirements, always available, the natural base for no-weapon or no-armor challenge runs.
